name: Authentication
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/auth.ts — register/login/logout/me endpoints
apps/api/src/middleware/auth.ts — JWT verification + user existence guard
apps/api/src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts — rate limiting on auth endpoints
apps/web/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx — full login/register flow with cookie handling
apps/web/src/pages/Login.tsx — login UI with error feedback
recommended_next_step: E2E test: login → protected route access → logout → redirect to login

name: Company Management
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/dashboard.ts — GET/POST/PUT /companies + GET /companies/:id/members
apps/api/src/routes/dashboard.ts — create seeds companyMembers (OWNER role)
apps/web/src/layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx — company switcher + new company wizard modal
apps/web/src/components/CompanyWizard.tsx — 4-step onboarding wizard
recommended_next_step: Test multi-company switching with data isolation

name: Projects
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/projects.ts — full CRUD (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) + GET /:id/stats
apps/api/src/routes/dashboard.ts — POST /companies creates multiple projects from wizard payload
apps/web/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx — full CRUD UI with inline editing
apps/web/src/layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx — project switcher in sidebar
apps/web/src/pages/AgentsPage.tsx — agents scoped by projectId query param
apps/web/src/pages/TaskBoard.tsx — tasks scoped by projectId query param
recommended_next_step: Test project scoping: agents/tasks for different projects are isolated

name: Agents
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/agents.ts — full CRUD + /tree endpoint for hierarchy
apps/api/src/routes/agents.ts — reportsTo column + company access check on PUT/DELETE
apps/web/src/pages/AgentsPage.tsx — full CRUD UI, edit mode with reportsTo + skills
apps/api/src/db/schema.ts — agents table has reportsTo, platform, externalId, skill joins
recommended_next_step: Test reporting hierarchy: CEO→Founder, all Agents→Manager

name: Tasks
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/tasks.ts — full CRUD (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) with company scoping
apps/web/src/pages/TaskBoard.tsx — kanban with drag-drop, create/delete tasks
apps/web/src/pages/TaskBoard.tsx — tasks scoped by project
recommended_next_step: Test drag-drop persistence: change status triggers PUT call

name: Reporting Hierarchy
evidence: apps/api/src/db/schema.ts — agents.reportsTo (self-referencing FK)
apps/api/src/routes/agents.ts — GET /:companyId/tree returns hierarchical org tree
apps/web/src/pages/CompanyOrg.tsx — renders tree by reportsTo relationships
apps/api/src/routes/agents.ts — PUT /agents/:id accepts reportsTo field
CompanyWizard assigns reportsTo on company creation based on role
recommended_next_step: Edit an agent's reportsTo in UI, verify org chart updates

name: Skills
evidence: apps/api/src/db/schema.ts — skills + agent_skills tables
apps/api/src/routes/skills.ts — full CRUD + import endpoints
apps/api/src/utils/skillParser.ts — parses markdown into skills
apps/web/src/pages/AgentsPage.tsx — skill picker in agent edit mode
CompanyWizard assigns role-based default skills on company creation
blockers: UI only accessible through agent edit mode; no standalone skills page
Parser tested only on simple ## heading format; not tested against GStack-style SKILL.md files
Skills are not fetched on initial page load; loaded on demand in edit mode
recommended_next_step: Test skill import with a real GStack SKILL.md file

name: Connectors/Integrations
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/connectors.ts — full CRUD for connector configs
apps/api/src/connectors/index.ts — registry with Hermes + OpenClaw
apps/api/src/connectors/hermes.ts — Hermes webhook + event normalization
apps/api/src/connectors/openclaw.ts — OpenClaw webhook with secret validation
apps/web/src/pages/ConnectorsPage.tsx — UI for connector management
apps/api/src/routes/agents.ts — POST /connectors/:platform/webhook — auto-registers agents
blockers: Requires actual Hermes/OpenClaw servers running to receive webhooks
recommended_next_step: Connect a real OpenClaw instance to verify webhook flow

name: Dashboard
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/dashboard.ts — GET /companies/:id/dashboard returns stats + agents + events
apps/web/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx — renders KPIs, status wall, activity timeline
Company switcher + project selector in dashboard header
recommended_next_step: Test with populated data: verify KPIs update correctly

name: Calendar
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/calendar.ts — GET returns {events: []}, POST returns {ok: true}
No calendar_events table in schema.ts
apps/web/src/pages/CalendarMeetings.tsx — renders month view but gets empty data
recommended_next_step: Create calendar_events table, implement full CRUD

name: Chat
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/chat.ts — POST returns {ok: true}, no GET endpoint
No chat_messages table in schema.ts
apps/web/src/pages/ChatJournal.tsx — renders chat UI but fetches empty data
recommended_next_step: Create chat_messages table, implement GET + POST with company scoping

name: Files
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/files.ts — POST returns {ok: true}, no GET/DELETE
No files table in schema.ts
No file storage layer (local disk or cloud)
apps/web/src/pages/FileHub.tsx — uploads to /api/files which does nothing
recommended_next_step: Implement file storage: choose local disk or S3, add metadata table

name: Goals
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/goals.ts — full CRUD (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE)
apps/api/src/db/schema.ts — goals table exists with companyId, title, progress, parentId
apps/web/src/App.tsx — no /goals route defined
Dashboard queries goals for progress calc but no way to create/update goals from UI
blockers: No frontend page or route for goals
recommended_next_step: Add /goals route and page in App.tsx

name: Realtime Events
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/realtime.ts — GET /events returns empty string
No SSE or WebSocket implementation anywhere
Not used by any frontend page
recommended_next_step: Decide: SSE vs WebSocket; implement minimal push endpoint

name: Company Settings
evidence: apps/api/src/routes/dashboard.ts — GET /:id/members works
apps/web/src/pages/CompanySettings.tsx — company edit works with PUT /companies/:id
CompanySettings.tsx — member list fetches from DB (not mock data)
CompanySettings.tsx — invite button calls alert() — no POST endpoint
blockers: Member invite has no backend endpoint

name: Company Onboarding Wizard
evidence: apps/web/src/components/CompanyWizard.tsx — 4-step wizard (details → projects → team → review)
apps/api/src/routes/dashboard.ts — POST /companies accepts wizard payload (projects[], agents[] with reporting + skills)
Modal integration in DashboardLayout.tsx — 'New Company' opens wizard modal
Auto-assigns skills and reporting hierarchy on creation
recommended_next_step: Test end-to-end: wizard → company created with all entities
